blended.narrative: Mount St. Louis Moonstone is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.1 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 945 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.0" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
